stonetop.summary: Chameleon-skinned ambush drakes that spit pinning mucus.

system.concept: Chameleon-skinned ambush drakes that spit pinning mucus.
system.description: They're about the size of a big wolf, but lower and squatter, with arms out to the sides like lizards and a big old frill that pops up when they're startled or bearing down on prey. They favor canyons, defiles, or overlooks where they can bask in the sun but have a good angle to ambush passersby.

lore.prompt: **Something interesting:** Their mucus adheres quickly to rock, pinning prey in place; even unpinned it gloms on and slows them up, drying and flaking away after a few hours.
**Something useful:** Strong spirits (yes, like whisky) quickly dissolve the mucus. You can also identify their territory by the pale chalky stains it leaves on stone.
